content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 NoGigiddy: Entry-Level Account Manager Anywhere in the World Georgia Customer Support Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0144/3476/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Atlanta, Georgia <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.nogigiddy.com/">https://www.nogigiddy.com/</a> </p> <div>NoGigiddy is seeking a proactive and customer-focused Entry-Level Account Manager to join our remote team. In this role, you will build and maintain relationships with our clients, ensuring their needs are met and providing exceptional service. This position is perfect for someone eager to start their career in account management and customer service. No college degree is required, but strong communication skills and a passion for helping clients are essential.</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong><br>Key Responsibilities:</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <ul> <li>Client Relationship Management: Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, understanding their needs and ensuring their satisfaction.</li> <li>Communication: Act as the main point of contact for clients, addressing their inquiries, concerns, and requests promptly and effectively.</li> <li>Account Coordination: Assist in coordinating client accounts, including setting up new accounts, managing renewals, and ensuring all client information is up to date.</li> <li>Problem Solving: Identify and resolve client issues proactively, ensuring a positive client experience.</li> <li>Reporting: Prepare and deliver regular reports on account performance, client feedback, and service improvements.</li> <li>Collaboration: Work closely with internal teams, including sales, marketing, and customer support, to ensure client needs are met.</li> <li>Client Onboarding: Assist in onboarding new clients, providing them with the necessary resources and information to get started.</li> <li>Feedback Collection: Gather and relay client feedback to improve our services and client experience.</li> </ul> <div><strong><br>Skills and Qualifications:<br></strong></div> <ul> <li>Communication Skills: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills.</li> <li>Customer Service Skills: Strong ability to understand and meet client needs.</li> <li>Organizational Skills: Ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritize effectively.</li> <li>Interpersonal Skills: Strong ability to build and maintain relationships with clients and team members.</li> <li>Problem-Solving: Ability to address and resolve client issues effectively.</li> <li>Time Management: Strong ability to manage time and meet deadlines.</li> <li>Technical Skills: Basic proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook) and CRM software.</li> </ul> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>Preferred Experience:</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <ul> <li>Experience in customer service, sales, or a related field is a plus but not required.</li> <li>Familiarity with CRM software and account management tools is a plus.</li> <li>Previous experience with gig economy platforms or staffing apps is a plus.</li> </ul> <div><strong>Education:</strong></div> <ul> <li>High school diploma or equivalent.</li> <li>Relevant certifications or coursework in customer service, sales, or account management are beneficial but not required.</li> </ul> <div><strong>Working Conditions:</strong></div> <ul> <li>Remote Work: The role is remote, allowing for flexibility in work location.</li> <li>Collaboration: Regular virtual meetings and communications with the sales and support teams.</li> <li>Tools: Use of various communication and collaboration tools, such as email, video conferencing, and CRM software.</li> </ul> <div><strong>Salary Range:</strong></div> <ul> <li>$20 to $27 per hour, depending on experience and qualifications.</li> </ul> <div><br>If you are organized, detail-oriented, and passionate about providing excellent service to clients, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now to join NoGigiddy and make a difference in the gig economy.<br><br></div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nogigiddy-entry-level-account-manager-4">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nogigiddy-entry-level-account-manager-4</a></p> Wed, 20 May 2026 10:55:57 +0000 Fri, 19 Jun 2026 10:55:57 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nogigiddy-entry-level-account-manager-4 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nogigiddy-entry-level-account-manager-4 LOTARO: Cold Caller / VertriebsmitarbeiterIn (Freelance Basis) Anywhere in the World Sales and Marketing Contract <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Germany Munich </p> <p>Du bist Vollblut-Verkäufer und würdest gerne in einem der schnellst wachsenden Remote-Ed-Tech Unternehmen im deutschsprachigen Raum arbeiten?</p> <p>Mit unserem Unternehmen LOTARO haben wir aktuell ein Remote-Team aus +15 High-Performern.</p> <p>Konkret suchen wir nach Verstärkung in unserem Setting Team.</p> <p><strong>Warum du unbedingt Teil von Heartbeat werden solltest?</strong></p> <ul> <li>Extremer Produktfokus → du verkaufst ein echt gutes Produkt!</li> <li>Starkes Wachstum durch interne Weiterbildungen</li> <li>Einkommen selbst in der Hand haben</li> <li>Gute Aufstiegsmöglichkeiten bei starker Performance (Setter/Closer)</li> <li>Aufstrebendes Unternehmen mit großer Vision</li> <li>Flexible Arbeitsplatzgestaltung durch Remote-Kultur</li> </ul> <h2>Aufgaben</h2> <p>1. Qualifizierung von Leads</p> <p>2. Telefonische Vereinbarung von Sales Calls</p> <h2>Qualifikation</h2> <p><strong>Was du dafür mitbringen musst:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Erfahrung im Sales Bereich (B2B)</li> <li>Kommunikative Persönlichkeit</li> <li>Guten Umgang mit Menschen</li> <li>Volle Verfügbarkeit</li> <li>den Willen Vollgas zu geben</li> </ul> <p><strong>Berufserfahrung:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Vertrieb (B2B): 1 Jahr (notwendig)</li> </ul> <p><strong>Sprache:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Deutsch (Erforderlich)</li> </ul> <h2>Benefits</h2> <p><strong>Leistungen:</strong></p> <p>Betriebliche Weiterbildung</p> <p>Flexible Arbeitszeiten</p> <p>100% remote – arbeite von überall</p> <p><strong>Unsere Vision?</strong></p> <p>Wir bauen das beste Livetrainingsangebot für Unternehmen im deutschsprachigen Markt auf!</p> <p>Aktuell haben wir zu viele hungrige Interessenten und brauchen dringend High-Performer, die sich unsere Mission anschließen wollen.</p> <p>Wenn du also hungrig auf mehr bist und massiv wachsen möchtest - bewirb dich noch heute bei uns.</
